creator: marcel@scc.nl
text:
Hi,

mprime runs without problems on a -current (aug. 11 1999) system with the
specified options. Since the problem is based on a 2.2.2 system, is it
still relevant? Has the problem occured on newer systems? If not, with your
permission, I like to close the PR. Thoughts?

--
